## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── qwen_3_06b_base.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── qwen_image_vae.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── anima-base-v1.0.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 model_patches/
│   │   └── anima-lllite-any-test-like-v2.safetensors
│   └── 📂 loras/
│       └── anima-turbo-lora-v0.2.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

You can use other image preprocessors to replace the **Detect Edges (Canny)** for other types of control. 

You can find the natively supported preprocessors by: **Node Library** -> **Comfy Blueprints** -> **Conditioning & Preprocessors**

widgets_values:
Vertical symmetrical bust portrait, young soft-featured human woman, not robot, slim streamlined lightweight cybernetic mech exoskeleton (no bulky heavy armor), delicate feminine facial contours, face tilted upward, eyes gently fully closed, serene meditative trance expression, soft slightly parted full lips, quiet ethereal gentle mood.
Soft warm peach lifelike human skin, translucent tender facial texture, faint thin pale geometric circuit veins lightly etched across forehead, nose and cheekbones, subtle faint pink blush on cheekbones, smooth soft skin gradient shading to highlight delicate feminine beauty, wispy messy loose black shoulder hair flowing softly around her head to amplify gentle vibe.
Slim compact grey neural cranial auxiliary rig (not music headphones), minimal thin industrial brain connection equipment with rounded soft mechanical edges, slim articulated lightweight mechanical neck bracing integrated into slim mech suit, thin bright orange flexible data cables gently looping around neck (no thick bulky cable bundles), one thin central orange cable extending down from neck joint core.
Soft thin glowing orange luminous halo ring floating behind her head.
Background: intricate thin light grey circuit board schematic line patterns, slender vertical dark metal pipes, symmetrical blueprint circuit lines, warm muted sepia circular gradient backdrop, completely no kanji, no text, no letters anywhere.
Art style: retro Japanese graphic manga illustration, sharp clean soft ink outlines, restrained muted color palette of ash grey, warm sepia beige, subtle pop of bright orange accents, fusion of elegant ukiyo-e symmetrical composition & soft retro cyberpunk, rounded smooth mech metal textures with matte fine brushed metal finish (avoid blocky heavy steel), soft organic rendering for human face/hair, strong tender contrast between delicate feminine flesh and slim streamlined soft-edged machinery, tranquil dreamy gentle atmosphere, high detail graphic illustration.
